name: rdna_45S_NOR_chr4
description: 45S ribosomal DNA NOR on chr4 short arm in zebrafish. Repeat unit ~11.5 kb containing 18S-5.8S-28S genes plus IGS. Copy number 200-500 per haploid genome; assembly is collapsed in GRCz11 to a few placeholder copies. Single primary NOR locus.
expected_copy_count: 200-500 tandem 11.5 kb 45S units per haploid genome
